parameters.name: ncy
parameters.label: Number of Copies
parameters.description: Sets the number of copies.

parameters.name: ptcomputedat
parameters.label: Points Compute Shader
parameters.description: containing the point compute shader code.

parameters.name: ptoutputattrs
parameters.label: Point Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input point attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: vertcomputemethod
parameters.label: Verts Compute Method
parameters.description: compute shader method.

parameters.name: vertcomputedat
parameters.label: Verts Compute Shader
parameters.description: containing the vertex compute shader.

parameters.name: vertoutputattrs
parameters.label: Vert Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input vertex attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: primcomputemethod
parameters.label: Prim Compute Method
parameters.description: compute shader method.

parameters.name: primcomputedat
parameters.label: Prim Compute Shader
parameters.description: containing the primitive compute shader.

parameters.name: primoutputattrs
parameters.label: Prim Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input primitive attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: dimension
parameters.label: Append Dimension
parameters.description: Always add a dimension, or only add a dimesion when its size is 2 or more.

parameters.name: simplexnoise
parameters.label: TDSimplexNoise()
parameters.description: Sets the implementation to use for a simplex noise method that can be called in the shader.

parameters.name: attr
parameters.label: New Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new attributes.

parameters.name: attr0class
parameters.label: New Attribute Class
parameters.description: The attribute class for the new attribute.

parameters.name: attr0name
parameters.label: New Attribute Name
parameters.description: Choose to create a predefined attribute or a custom attribute.

parameters.name: attr0type
parameters.label: New Attribute Type
parameters.description: Determines the type.

parameters.name: attr0isarray
parameters.label: Array
parameters.description: Attribute is an array, for example 5 float3 values is an array of size 5.

parameters.name: attr0arraysize
parameters.label: Array Size
parameters.description: Array Size of the new attribute.

parameters.name: matattr
parameters.label: Matrix Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new matrix attributes.

parameters.name: matattr0class
parameters.label: Matrix Attribute Class
parameters.description: Determines the attribute class where the matrix attribute can be created.

parameters.name: matattr0name
parameters.label: Custom Matrix Name
parameters.description: Determines the new matrix attribute name.

parameters.name: matattr0numrows
parameters.label: Rows
parameters.description: Number of rows in the matrix - 2, 3 or 4.

parameters.name: matattr0numcols
parameters.label: Columns
parameters.description: Number of columns in the matrix - 2, 3 or 4.

parameters.name: matattr0isarray
parameters.label: Array
parameters.description: Attribute is an array, for example 5 float3 values is an array of size 5.

parameters.name: matattr0arraysize
parameters.label: Array Size
parameters.description: Nunber of elements in the array of matrices.

parameters.name: matattr0qualifier
parameters.label: Qualifier
parameters.description: Additional detail on how the attribute should be interpreted.

parameters.name: color
parameters.label: Color
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for color uniforms.

parameters.name: color0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the color uniform.

parameters.name: color0alpha
parameters.label: Alpha
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vec
parameters.label: Vector
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to define uniform variables.

parameters.name: vec0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the vector uniform.

parameters.name: vec0type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: The number of components for the array.

parameters.name: sampler
parameters.label: Sampler
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for Samplers to read from the shader.

parameters.name: sampler0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the sampler uniform.

parameters.name: sampler0top
parameters.label: TOP
parameters.description: Sets reference to a to sample.

parameters.name: sampler0extendu
parameters.label: Extend U
parameters.description: Controls what is returned from the texture sampling functions when the U texture coordinates are outside [0-1] range.

parameters.name: sampler0extendv
parameters.label: Extend V
parameters.description: Controls what is returned from the texture sampling functions when the V texture coordinates are outside [0-1] range.

parameters.name: sampler0extendw
parameters.label: Extend W
parameters.description: Controls what is returned from the texture sampling functions when the W texture coordinates are outside [0-1] range.

parameters.name: sampler0filter
parameters.label: Filter
parameters.description: Controls the pixel filtering on the input image of the .

parameters.name: array
parameters.label: Array
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for array uniforms.

parameters.name: array0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the array uniform.

parameters.name: array0type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: The number of components for the array.

parameters.name: array0chop
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: The for the current uniform.

parameters.name: matrix
parameters.label: Matrix
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks of matrix uniforms.

parameters.name: matrix0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the matrix uniform.

parameters.name: matrix0value
parameters.label: Matrix
parameters.description: Sets a reference to a matrix to pass to the shader.

parameters.name: tempbuffer
parameters.label: Temp Buffer
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks forTemporary buffers used to pass information to the shader as uniforms.

parameters.name: tempbuffer0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the temporary buffer.

parameters.name: tempbuffer0initval
parameters.label: Initial Value
parameters.description: Initial value for the current temporary buffer.

parameters.name: const
parameters.label: Constant
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for Specialization Constants.

parameters.name: const0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: The name of the constant.

parameters.name: const0value
parameters.label: Value
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.label: Buffer
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for attribute buffers.

parameters.name: buffer0pop
parameters.label: POP
parameters.description: to select the attribute from.

parameters.name: buffer0attrclass
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Attribute class for the attribute for the current buffer block.

parameters.name: buffer0attr
parameters.label: Attribute
parameters.description: Name of attribute for current buffer block.

parameters.name: buffer0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Name to be used in the shader for the attribute buffer.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

examples.label: Configure Point Output Attributes and Name
examples.code:
n = op('glslcopy1')
n.par.ptoutputattrs = 'P N'
n.par.vec0name = 'uRotate'
n.par.vec0valuex = 40
examples.description: Common settings from 3 real Derivative examples
